verses.text: The women come with spices at dawn, wondering who will roll the stone, but it is rolled away. Removed barrier. God opens the way to the empty tomb.
The women come with spices at dawn, wondering who will roll the stone, but it is rolled away. Removed barrier. God opens the way to the empty tomb.
The women come with spices at dawn, wondering who will roll the stone, but it is rolled away. Removed barrier. God opens the way to the empty tomb.
The women come with spices at dawn, wondering who will roll the stone, but it is rolled away. Removed barrier. God opens the way to the empty tomb.
A young man in white says, 'Be not affrighted... he is risen; he is not here'; go tell the disciples and Peter. The great news. The risen Lord is proclaimed, and Peter named in mercy.
A young man in white says, 'Be not affrighted... he is risen; he is not here'; go tell the disciples and Peter. The great news. The risen Lord is proclaimed, and Peter named in mercy.
A young man in white says, 'Be not affrighted... he is risen; he is not here'; go tell the disciples and Peter. The great news. The risen Lord is proclaimed, and Peter named in mercy.
They flee, trembling and amazed, and say nothing for fear. Overwhelmed. The wonder of the resurrection first leaves them speechless.
He appears first to Mary Magdalene; she tells the mourning disciples, but they believe not. Slow to believe. The good news meets unbelieving hearts.
He appears first to Mary Magdalene; she tells the mourning disciples, but they believe not. Slow to believe. The good news meets unbelieving hearts.
He appears first to Mary Magdalene; she tells the mourning disciples, but they believe not. Slow to believe. The good news meets unbelieving hearts.
He appears in another form to two on the road; neither do they believe. Repeated doubt. Even eyewitnesses are slow to trust.
He appears in another form to two on the road; neither do they believe. Repeated doubt. Even eyewitnesses are slow to trust.
He appears to the eleven and upbraids their unbelief and hardness of heart. Gentle reproof. He chides the slowness that doubted His rising.
'Go ye into all the world, and preach the gospel to every creature'; he that believes and is baptized shall be saved. The commission. The gospel is for every creature under heaven.
'Go ye into all the world, and preach the gospel to every creature'; he that believes and is baptized shall be saved. The commission. The gospel is for every creature under heaven.
Signs shall follow believers: casting out devils, new tongues, and healing the sick. Confirming power. God attests the early gospel with wonders.
Signs shall follow believers: casting out devils, new tongues, and healing the sick. Confirming power. God attests the early gospel with wonders.
The Lord is received up into heaven and sits at God's right hand; they preach, the Lord working with them. Ascended Lord. He reigns above while His servants spread the word below.
The Lord is received up into heaven and sits at God's right hand; they preach, the Lord working with them. Ascended Lord. He reigns above while His servants spread the word below.
